svg.text: Hover a cell for details; click a cell to zoom and pin details · Ctrl+F to search
select testdb.t1.id AS id,testdb.t1.a AS a,testdb.t1.b AS b,testdb.t1.c AS c,testdb.t1.d AS d
Cell area = total time (including children). Click a cell to zoom.
Where a warning applies: hover the cell — the details bar shows “In Query Analysis” and the label that appears in the panel below.
semijoin=on — IN / EXISTS subqueries are rewritten into a semi-join with the outer query and then resolved via one of the semijoin strategies (firstmatch, loosescan,
duplicateweedout=on — Semijoin strategy: runs the subquery as a normal inner join and then removes duplicate outer rows using a temporary table keyed on their row IDs.
• Add indexes on filter/join columns to avoid full table scans
• Full scan on t2 with filter on (y, x)
CREATE INDEX idx_t2_y_x ON t2 (y, x);
